global_coherence_check.drift_diagnosis: Spec faithfully implements discover intent. Star topology matches main-agent-as-router architecture. All subagent outputs bounded. Skill markdown only constraint respected.

MOD-A only routes and presents. No compute inline.
All 5 subagent modules declare output size constraints matching requirement ACs.
Error handling consistent. Domain error mapping added to MOD-G.
7 modules justified by file boundaries. No merge candidates.
Clean star topology. MOD-A hub, MOD-B-F spokes, MOD-G shared protocol.
